title: Real Day Counter
description: A mod adding a counter of how many REAL LIFE days have passed since the creation of a world. Especially useful for SMP.
body: A simple mod adding a counter for how many REAL WORLD days have passed with the creation of the world, which is displayed to players when they join the world. A great way to keep track of time on SMP's or SP worlds and see how it's developed along time!
